subcodes.first_line: O thou who speaketh in praise of the Chosen Beauty! Render thanks unto the Ancient Beauty, the Sovereign Lord of the realm of imperishable glory, that the loved ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناطق بثنای جمال مختار شکر جمال قیوم و سلطان ملک عزت قدیمه را که احبای
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
